requirement_topic.en: Sea transport — UN 38.3 and IMDG dangerous-goods classification

summary.en: All BESS lithium-ion batteries shipped to Barbados by sea must comply with UN 38.3 (Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods — Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) and the International Maritime Dangerous Goods (IMDG) Code. UN 38.3 test reports are mandatory for international sea freight of lithium cells and batteries. Bridgetown is the primary entry port; IMDG compliance documentation must be presented to the shipping line and port authority.
summary.zh: 所有通过海运发往巴巴多斯的BESS锂离子电池须符合UN 38.3（《关于危险货物运输的建议书——测试和标准》第三部分第38.3节）及《国际海运危险货物规则》（IMDG规则）。UN 38.3测试报告是锂电池单体和电池组国际海运的强制要求。布里奇敦是主要入境港口，须向船运公司和港口当局提交IMDG合规文件。
summary.zht: 所有通過海運發往巴巴多斯的BESS鋰離子電池須符合UN 38.3（《關於危險貨物運輸的建議書——測試和標準》第三部分第38.3節）及《國際海運危險貨物規則》（IMDG規則）。UN 38.3測試報告是鋰電池單體和電池組國際海運的強制要求。布里奇敦是主要入境港口，須向船運公司和港口當局提交IMDG合規文件。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 (Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods — Tests and Criteria, Rev.7, 2019 + Amend. 1)
IMDG Code 2022 (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code, Amendment 41-22)
SOLAS 1974 as amended (Chapter VII — Carriage of Dangerous Goods)

summary.en: China requires UN 38.3 test reports for export of lithium batteries under GB/T 28164-2011 and the transport regulations enforced by civil aviation and maritime regulators. Chinese manufacturers usually obtain UN 38.3 reports from accredited laboratories (for example CBTL or CTI). The standard itself is the same globally.
summary.zh: 中国依据GB/T 28164-2011及民航、海运监管规则，要求出口锂电池提供UN 38.3测试报告。中国制造商通常从认可实验室（如CBTL、CTI）获取UN 38.3报告。该标准本身全球一致。
summary.zht: 中國依據GB/T 28164-2011及民航、海運監管規則，要求出口鋰電池提供UN 38.3測試報告。中國製造商通常從認可實驗室（如CBTL、CTI）獲取UN 38.3報告。該標準本身全球一致。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 28164-2011 (Secondary lithium cells and batteries for portable applications — transport tests)
IATA DGR (for air freight — separate from sea freight scope)

gap.en: UN 38.3 is internationally uniform — a valid report from an accredited laboratory is accepted globally. Practical gaps are: (1) scope: report must cover the exact cell model and battery configuration being shipped; (2) module/system-level testing: large BESS units may require testing at module or system level; (3) full IMDG documentation (DGD, SDS, packing certificate) must be complete and accurate; and (4) sea-transport state-of-charge limits must be met under IMDG special provision 376.
gap.zh: UN 38.3标准国际统一——任何认可实验室出具的有效报告在全球均被接受。实际差距在于：（1）范围：报告须覆盖所发运的具体电芯型号与电池配置；（2）模组/系统级测试：大功率BESS可能需要在模组或系统级进行测试；（3）IMDG运输文件（危险货物申报单、安全数据表、集装箱装箱证书）需完整准确；（4）海运荷电状态须符合IMDG特殊规定376。
gap.zht: UN 38.3標準國際統一——任何認可實驗室出具的有效報告在全球均被接受。實際差距在於：（1）範圍：報告須覆蓋所發運的具體電芯型號與電池配置；（2）模組/系統級測試：大型BESS可能需要在模組或系統級進行測試；（3）IMDG運輸文件（危險貨物申報單、安全數據表、集裝箱裝箱證書）需完整準確；（4）海運荷電狀態須符合IMDG特殊規定376。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IMDG Code requirement for all international sea freight of lithium batteries
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export — same standard (UN 38.3); typically already held by Chinese exporters

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — Dangerous Goods

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 is an internationally uniform standard — Chinese laboratory reports are valid if the laboratory is accredited. However, exporters must verify: (a) the report covers the exact cell model and battery configuration being shipped to Barbados, (b) large BESS modules have been tested at the proper level, and (c) full IMDG shipping documentation including SOC limits is complete. Bridgetown is the practical entry point — incomplete documentation can cause detention.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3是国际统一标准——如实验室经认可，中国测试报告有效。出口商仍须核验：（a）报告覆盖出口至巴巴多斯的具体电芯型号与电池配置；（b）大型BESS模组已在适当级别测试；（c）包含SOC限制在内的IMDG运输文件完整。布里奇敦为实际入境口岸，不完整文件会导致扣货。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3是國際統一標準——如實驗室經認可，中國測試報告有效。出口商仍須核驗：（a）報告覆蓋出口至巴巴多斯的具體電芯型號與電池配置；（b）大型BESS模組已在適當級別測試；（c）包含SOC限制在內的IMDG運輸文件完整。布里奇敦為實際入境口岸，不完整文件會導致扣貨。

requirement_topic.en: Transport safety — IEC 62281 safety in transport

summary.en: IEC 62281:2019 (Safety of primary and secondary lithium cells and batteries during transport) specifies product-level transport safety requirements for lithium cells and batteries, complementing UN 38.3 tests. Barbados project documents for BESS shipments reference IEC 62281 alongside UN 38.3. IEC 62281 covers protection against external short circuit, overcharge, forced discharge, and mechanical damage during transport.
summary.zh: IEC 62281:2019（运输过程中一次和二次锂电池单体及电池组的安全）规定了运输过程中锂电池单体和电池组的安全要求，作为UN 38.3测试要求的补充。巴巴多斯BESS运输文件将IEC 62281与UN 38.3并列引用。IEC 62281涵盖运输中的外短路、过充、强制放电和机械损伤保护。
summary.zht: IEC 62281:2019（運輸過程中一次和二次鋰電池單體及電池組的安全）規定了運輸過程中鋰電池單體及電池組的產品級安全要求，作為UN 38.3測試要求的補充。巴巴多斯BESS運輸文件將IEC 62281與UN 38.3並列引用。IEC 62281涵蓋運輸中的外短路、過充、強制放電和機械損傷保護。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62281:2019 (Safety of primary and secondary lithium cells and batteries during transport)

summary.en: China's GB/T 28164-2011 is the national standard for lithium-cell transport in portable applications. For larger BESS modules, GB/T 36276-2023 and GB 38031-2020 include transport-related clauses. Chinese exporters typically hold UN 38.3 reports, but IEC 62281 certification from an accredited body remains an additional requirement for some Barbados-related shipments.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 28164-2011是便携式应用二次锂电池运输的国家标准。对于较大BESS模组，GB/T 36276-2023和GB 38031-2020含运输相关测试条款。中国出口商通常持有UN 38.3报告，但对于面向巴巴多斯的某些项目，来自认可机构的IEC 62281认证仍是附加要求。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 28164-2011是便攜式應用二次鋰電池運輸的國家標準。對於較大BESS模組，GB/T 36276-2023和GB 38031-2020含運輸相關測試條款。中國出口商通常持有UN 38.3報告，但對於面向巴巴多斯的某些項目，來自認可機構的IEC 62281認證仍是附加要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 28164-2011 (Secondary lithium cells and batteries — portable applications — transport tests)

gap.en: IEC 62281 certification is an additional requirement beyond UN 38.3 for BESS shipments to Barbados. Chinese manufacturers holding UN 38.3 but not IEC 62281 must obtain IEC 62281 conformity evidence from an accredited body. Some overlap exists, so IEC 62619-certified products can sometimes extend existing evidence with additional transport tests.
gap.zh: IEC 62281认证是巴巴多斯BESS海运需求中除UN 38.3以外的附加要求。持有UN 38.3但未持有IEC 62281认证的中国制造商须向认可机构获取IEC 62281合格证明。部分测试可与既有数据重叠，因此已持有IEC 62619认证的产品可通过补测更快完成。
gap.zht: IEC 62281認證是巴巴多斯BESS海運需求中除UN 38.3以外的附加要求。持有UN 38.3但未持有IEC 62281認證的中國製造商須向認可機構獲取IEC 62281合格證明。部分測試可與既有資料重疊，因此已持有IEC 62619認證的產品可通過補測更快完成。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory per project technical package for BESS shipments to Barbados
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 28164 covers portable cells; no mandatory IEC 62281 equivalent for stationary BESS

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62281:2019 certification from an accredited body is required alongside UN 38.3 test reports for BESS shipments to Barbados. GB/T 28164 transport documents are not accepted as a full substitute. Manufacturers with existing IEC 62619 records should request scope extension or combined testing for IEC 62281 to reduce cost and lead time.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除UN 38.3测试报告外，发往巴巴多斯的BESS货运还须提供来自认可机构的IEC 62281:2019认证。中国GB/T 28164运输文件不能作为完整替代。已具备IEC 62619记录的制造商可申请范围扩展或合并测试以降低成本和周期。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除UN 38.3測試報告外，發往巴巴多斯的BESS貨運還須提供來自認可機構的IEC 62281:2019認證。中國GB/T 28164運輸文件不能作為完整替代。已具備IEC 62619記錄的製造商可申請範圍擴展或合併測試以降低成本和週期。

requirement_topic.en: Port of entry and customs — Bridgetown
requirement_topic.zh: 入境港口与海关——布里奇敦
requirement_topic.zht: 入境港口與海關——布里奇敦

summary.en: Bridgetown (usually Bridgetown Port/Darings harbour facilities on the Barbados coast) is the primary commercial entry point for all BESS cargo into Barbados. Customs and import controls are handled through Barbados tax and customs authorities. BESS imports may be subject to duties, VAT, and dangerous-goods handling charges. Pre-arrival notification for dangerous-goods shipments is required. Import documentation should be submitted in English.
summary.zh: 布里奇敦（通常指位于巴巴多斯海岸的布里奇敦港及相关设施）是巴巴多斯BESS货物的主要商业入境点。海关和进口管理由巴巴多斯税务与海关机构执行。BESS进口可能需缴纳关税、增值税和危险品处理费用。危险品货物需要抵达前申报，进口文件应使用英文提交。
summary.zht: 布里奇敦（通常指位於巴巴多斯海岸的布里奇敦港及相關設施）是巴巴多斯BESS貨物的主要商業入境點。海關與進口管理由巴巴多斯稅務與海關機構執行。BESS進口可能需繳納關稅、增值稅和危險品處理費。危險品貨物需要抵達前申報，進口文件應使用英文提交。

standards_or_laws: Seychelles-like dangerous-goods handling model adjusted for Barbados ports

summary.en: China export processes include GACC declaration, CIQ inspections for electrical equipment, and dangerous-goods certifications through agency channels. Chinese export documentation is usually in Chinese; English customs and carrier documentation plus internationally harmonized danger labels are required for Barbados arrival.
summary.zh: 中国出口流程包括海关总署（GACC）申报、CIQ电气设备检验以及通过相关机构完成危险品认证。中国出口文件通常为中文，进入巴巴多斯时必须提供英文海关与承运人文件，以及国际统一危险品标签。
summary.zht: 中國出口流程包括海關總署（GACC）申報、CIQ電氣設備檢驗以及通過相關機構完成危險品認證。中國出口文件通常為中文，進入巴巴多斯時必須提供英文海關與承運人文件，以及國際統一危險品標籤。

standards_or_laws: GACC — China Customs export declaration requirements
China MOT dangerous-goods sea transport regulations
IMDG Code (China and Barbados both apply)

gap.en: Logistics gap: Barbados is a small-island destination with limited container and dangerous-goods handling capacity. BESS shipments must be planned for Bridgetown constraints, long transit windows, and strict English-language paperwork.
gap.zh: 物流差距：巴巴多斯是小型岛国，散货装卸与危险品处理能力有限。BESS货运必须考虑布里奇敦港容量约束、较长运输窗口和严格的英文文件要求。
gap.zht: 物流差距：巴巴多斯是小型島國，散貨裝卸與危險品處理能力有限。BESS貨運必須考慮布里奇敦港容量約束、較長運輸窗口和嚴格的英文文件要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — customs and port authority requirements
mandatory_status.cn: N/A — China export customs are separate; IMDG compliance for sea export is mandatory

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] All BESS imports to Barbados are planned through Bridgetown port operations. Chinese exporters should engage a licensed local freight forwarder familiar with dangerous-goods handling in Barbados. Full English-language IMDG documentation must be submitted for pre-clearance before vessel arrival. Capacity constraints mean shipment adjustments should be planned earlier than in larger regional hubs.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 所有面向巴巴多斯的BESS进口均经由布里奇敦港进行。中国出口商应委托熟悉巴巴多斯危险品操作的持牌当地货运代理。完整的英文IMDG文件须在船舶到港前提交用于预清关。港口容量限制意味着必须提前安排，不适合临时调整。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 所有面向巴巴多斯的BESS進口均經由布里奇敦港進行。中國出口商應委託熟悉巴巴多斯危險品操作的持牌當地貨運代理。完整的英文IMDG文件須在船舶到港前提交用於預清關。港口容量限制意味著必須提前安排，不適合臨時調整。
